description: Public demo workflow for the open-source release path

command_evaluators.name: demo-public-budget
command: import json; from pathlib import Path; payload=json.loads(Path('effective_config.json').read_text(encoding='utf-8')); budget=payload.get('budget') or {}; max_turns=int(budget.get('max_turns', 0) or 0); adjustment=round(max_turns / 10, 3); print(json.dumps({'maintainability': {'budget_headroom': adjustment}, 'probes': {'demo_public.max_turns': max_turns}, 'composite_adjustment': adjustment}))
